title: São Gonçalo Heat Wave
lead: São Gonçalo is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.09. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in São Gonçalo is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 63%, and the wind speed is 6.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to the prolonged heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on São Gonçalo.
